lines.english: It torments us with the expression of pleasure and pain.
It is seen to afflict the rich, the poor and the glorious.
It torments us through incarnations in heaven and hell.
Maya torments us in so many ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਓਟ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant jeeveh prabh ott tumaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But the Saints live under Your Protection, God. ||1||Pause||
The source of this illness which torments us is greed. ||1||
It torments us through elephants, horses and beautiful clothes.
It torments us through the love of children and spouse.
It torments us through intoxication with intellectual pride.
It torments us through the intoxication of wine and the beauty of youth. ||2||
It torments landlords, paupers and lovers of pleasure.
It torments us through the sweet sounds of music and parties.
It torments us through the darkness of the five evil passions. ||3||
It torments those who act, entangled in ego.
It torments us through beautiful beds, palaces and decorations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਬਿਆਪਤ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗ ਰਾਤ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh biaapat bin har rang raat |4|
lines.english: It torments us through everything, except for those who are imbued with the Love of the Lord. ||4||
It torments us through character, lifestyle and social status.
It torments us through household affairs, and it torments us in renunciation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨਿ ਧੂਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jin dhoor sant paaee |
lines.english: Says Nanak, Maya does not draw near those

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: santan ke bandhan kaatte har raae |
lines.english: The Sovereign Lord King has cut away the bonds of His Saints.
How can Maya torment them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮਾਈ ॥੫॥੧੯॥੮੮॥
lines.translit: taa kai nikatt na aavai maaee |5|19|88|
lines.english: Who have obtained the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||5||19||88||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
The tongue is asleep, in its desire for sweet flavors.
The mind is asleep, fascinated by Maya. ||1||
The eyes are asleep in corruption, gazing upon the beauty of another.
The ears are asleep, listening to slanderous stories.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਬਤੁ ਵਸਤੁ ਓਹੁ ਅਪਨੀ ਲਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saabat vasat ohu apanee lahai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: by doing so, they receive the whole thing. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਗਤੁ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: eis grih meh koee jaagat rahai |
lines.english: Those who remain awake in this house are very rare;
All of my companions are intoxicated with their sensory pleasures;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕੀ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: grih apune kee khabar na jaatee |
lines.english: they do not know how to guard their own home.
The five thieves have plundered them;
they cannot be restrained by wealth or cleverness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨ ਤੇ ਰਾਖੈ ਮੀਤੁ ਨ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aun te raakhai meet na bhaaee |
lines.english: friends and brothers cannot protect us from them

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨ ਤੇ ਰਾਖੈ ਬਾਪੁ ਨ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aun te raakhai baap na maaee |
lines.english: Our mothers and fathers cannot save us from them;
the thugs descend upon the unguarded village. ||2||
Have Mercy upon me, O Lord, Sustainer of the world.
Only through the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, can those villains be brought under control. ||3||
The dust of the feet of the Saints is all the treasure I need.
In the Company of the True Guru, one's investment remains intact.
He alone is awake, unto whom God shows His Mercy.
Nanak is awake to the Love of the Supreme Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਸਾਬਤੁ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਲੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੨੦॥੮੯॥
lines.translit: eih poonjee saabat dhan maal |1| rahaau doojaa |20|89|
lines.english: This investment, wealth and property shall remain intact. ||1||Second Pause||20||89||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
other than Him, there is nothing at all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa keea sabh kichh hoe |
lines.english: Everything is done by His doing;
Kings and emperors are under His Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਸਗਲ ਜਹਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai vas hai sagal jahaan |
lines.english: The whole world is under His Power.
He will resolve your affairs. ||1||Pause||
Offer your prayers to your True Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te aooch jaa kaa darabaar |
lines.english: The Darbaar of His Court is the most exalted of all.
The Perfect Master is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਭਗਤ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sagal bhagat jaa kaa naam adhaar |
lines.english: His Name is the Support of all His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਬਨੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa kee sobhaa ghatt ghatt banee |2|
lines.english: His Glory is manifest in each and every heart. ||2||
Remembering Him in meditation, the home of sorrow is abolished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਜਮੁ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਕਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis simarat jam kichhoo na kahai |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, the Messenger of Death shall not touch you.
Remembering Him in meditation, the dry branches become green again.
